title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker
reviews: Deeply satisfying conclusion despite rushed pacing
Rey's journey felt genuinely emotionally earned
Visual spectacle with surprising heartfelt moments
Nostalgic finale that mostly delivers satisfaction
Palpatine's return surprisingly worked for me
Epic space battles exceeded all expectations
Character arcs concluded better than anticipated
Crowd-pleasing blockbuster with genuine emotional weight
Divisive but personally found it rewarding
Ambitious finale stumbles but ultimately succeeds
Fan service done right for once
Left theater feeling surprisingly moved overall
Messy but emotionally resonant final chapter
Spectacular visuals elevate convoluted storytelling choices
Better on rewatch than initial viewing
Polarizing ending I personally found satisfying
Chaotic energy somehow works despite flaws
Nostalgic comfort food for longtime fans
Imperfect but emotionally fulfilling saga conclusion
Redeemed sequel trilogy in my opinion
